# Divorce and Bankruptcy -- Which to File First? [2026] -- Divorceanddebt
> Should you file bankruptcy before or after divorce? Shared debts, property division, and strategic timing. 2026 guide.

## About
divorceanddebt.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Timing and Divorce -- Before, During, or After? -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/bankruptcy-timing-and-divorce.html
- Community Property States and Debt in Divorce -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/community-property-states.html
- Credit Card Debt in Divorce -- Joint Cards, Authorized Users, and Division -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/credit-card-debt-divorce.html
- Domestic Support Obligations in Bankruptcy -- What Cannot Be Discharged -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/domestic-support-obligations.html
- Hold Harmless Clauses in Divorce -- What They Mean and Their Limits -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/hold-harmless-clauses.html
- Divorce and Bankruptcy -- Which to File First? [2026] -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/
- Joint Debt After Divorce -- Protecting Yourself When Your Ex Doesn't Pay -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/joint-debt-after-divorce.html
- Marital Debt Division in Divorce -- Who Pays What? -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/marital-debt-division.html
- Mortgage After Divorce -- Refinancing, Selling, and Protecting Your Credit -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/mortgage-after-divorce.html
- Student Loans in Divorce -- Division, Responsibility, and Bankruptcy -- Divorceanddebt: https://divorceanddebt.org/student-loans-in-divorce.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
